reference_set.note: Shared accessor file that fans out into many component families through contentModifier plumbing
reference_set.description: content_modifier_helper_accessor.cpp is a cross-component fan-out node. It affects button, checkbox, checkboxgroup, datapanel, gauge, loadingprogress, progress, radio, rating, select, slider, textclock, texttimer, toggle families through shared contentModifier/menuItemContentModifier plumbing.
